{{- $raw := .Inner -}} {{- $blocks := split $raw "\n---" -}}
{{- range $i, $block := $blocks -}} {{- if gt $i 0 -}} {{- $lines := split $block "\n" -}} {{- $meta := index $lines 0 -}} {{- $parts := split $meta "|" -}} {{- $id := index $parts 0 -}} {{- $title := index $parts 1 -}} {{- $active := "" -}} {{- if ge (len $parts) 3 -}}{{- $active = index $parts 2 -}}{{- end -}} {{- end -}} {{- end -}}
{{- range $i, $block := $blocks -}} {{- if gt $i 0 -}} {{- $lines := split $block "\n" -}} {{- $meta := index $lines 0 -}} {{- $parts := split $meta "|" -}} {{- $id := index $parts 0 -}} {{- $active := "" -}} {{- if ge (len $parts) 3 -}}{{- $active = index $parts 2 -}}{{- end -}} {{- $content := "" -}} {{- range $j, $line := $lines -}} {{- if gt $j 0 -}} {{- if gt $j 1 -}}{{- $content = printf "%s\n" $content -}}{{- end -}} {{- $content = printf "%s%s" $content $line -}} {{- end -}} {{- end -}}
{{ $content | markdownify | safeHTML }}
{{- end -}} {{- end -}}
